behavior_summary: When this entity is hit (Event 6 / U8P_DANGEREW::gotHit) the script inspects the incoming item/attack and a numeric parameter to decide between two primary reaction paths.
If the incoming parameter is zero or the attacking item fails scripted property checks, the function returns early and does nothing.

If the attacking item and parameter match a scripted condition, the script sets the attacker's visible frame and spawns a short-lived helper process that animates the frame over time (cycling frames and spawning a small visual/timing effect).

If the match fails, the script plays a fallback sound effect and — for non-dead NPC targets — computes a small random offset, obtains a direction from the item, and invokes a game METHOD (METHOD::0080) to apply a directional reaction (likely knockback or similar).
notable_control_flow: Early exit when the numeric parameter (BP+0Ah) is zero.
A guarded matching sequence reads item properties (quality, frame, shape) and branches: success -> set item frame + spawn helper; failure -> playSFX then NPC-specific reaction.
NPC branch checks Item::isNpc and Npc::isDead to avoid reacting to dead NPCs.
Helper process (U8P_DANGEREW::DANGEREW::0165) loops, incrementing/decrementing a small frame counter between bounds and suspending between steps until the animation completes.
open_questions: Exact semantic meaning of the incoming numeric parameter at BP+0Ah (damage, type code, or frame/index) — inferred but not certain.
Precise purpose of METHOD::0080 (appears to apply movement/knockback or a directional effect) and details of how its parameters influence behavior.
Exact constant meanings used in the matching checks (shape/frame/quality constants) and whether they map to specific in-game item types.
What visual or gameplay effect FREE::1C19 spawns each animation step (likely a visual spark/timer) and whether it affects gameplay beyond visuals.

main_function.name: U8P_DANGEREW::gotHit
main_function.purpose: Handle an entity being struck: inspect the attacking item and an incoming numeric parameter, change item frame and spawn an animation helper if matched; otherwise play a sound and (for living NPCs) invoke a directional reaction (likely knockback).
entry_conditions: Event 6 (U8P_DANGEREW::gotHit) — runs when the entity is hit.
Requires a non-zero numeric parameter (BP+0Ah) to proceed past early guard.

function_map.name: U8P_DANGEREW::gotHit
function_map.role: Event handler for 'U8P_DANGEREW::gotHit' that dispatches between animation-spawn and fallback reaction paths.

function_map.name: U8P_DANGEREW::0165
function_map.role: Spawned animation routine: iterates a frame counter (bounds 1..5), sets item frames, spawns FREE::1C19 each step and suspends between steps; ends by resetting frame to 0.

function_map.name: Item::getQuality
function_map.role: Query the attacking item's quality/quantity field to match scripted conditions.

function_map.name: Item::setFrame
function_map.role: Change the visible frame of an item (used both by the main handler and the helper animation).

function_map.name: U8P_DANGEREW::playSFX
function_map.role: Play a fallback sound effect when the primary match route is not taken.

function_map.name: Item::isNpc
function_map.role: Detect whether the target is an NPC to guard NPC-specific reaction logic.

function_map.name: Npc::isDead
function_map.role: Check NPC liveness to avoid applying reactions to dead NPCs.

function_map.name: urandom
function_map.role: Provide a small random offset used in NPC reaction parameterization.

function_map.name: Item::getDirFromItem
function_map.role: Extract a direction byte/value from the item used for directional reactions.

function_map.name: METHOD::0080
function_map.role: Apply a direction-based effect to the target (likely knockback or movement); called with direction, item pointer, and a local address.

function_map.name: FREE::1C19
function_map.role: Spawned repeatedly by the helper animation; likely a short-lived visual/timing effect.

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn an animation process to cycle item frames after a successful match.

external_calls.purpose: Read the attacking item's quality/quantity for conditional matching.
Set the attacking item's frame once when the scripted condition matches (prepares/marks it for animation).
Play a fallback sound when the match route is not taken.
Decide whether to perform NPC-specific reaction logic.
Guard against reacting to dead NPC targets.
Add randomness to the NPC reaction parameter (small offset to the value passed to METHOD::0080).
Obtain a direction value from the item to pass to METHOD::0080.
Apply the directional/knockback-like effect to the NPC using the computed params.
Update the item's visible frame each animation step.
Spawn a short-lived visual/timing effect each time the helper steps the frame counter.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: When this entity is hit (Event 6 / U8P_DANGEREW::gotHit) the script inspects the incoming item/attack and a numeric parameter to decide between two primary reaction paths.
